title: Public Player Profile
description: Per-player public-facing JSON artifact emitted by scripts/export_public_json.py. Consumed by the public ratings DB. Source documents: docs/SCHEMA-SPEC.md (Canonical v1.0), docs/PUBLIC-LANGUAGE-GUIDE.md §4-A (pull policy).

schema_version.description: Pinned schema version. Bumped semver-style on contract changes per SCHEMA-SPEC §10-L. v1.1 (2026-05-08) added optional career_stats appendix; additive bump.

rules_version.description: Pinned SCORING-RULES.md state at evaluation time. Format: 'R{first}-R{last} / S{session}'. Example: 'R1-R15 / S151'.

player.description: Canonical full name. Matches Player record per SCHEMA-SPEC §1.

draft_class.description: Draft year. Required (non-null) when career_status='Draft prospect'; null otherwise. See top-level if/then/else.

archetype.description: One of the active archetype names per ARCHETYPE-WEIGHTS-{Guards|Wings|Bigs}.md.

evaluation_date.description: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD. Matches source profile filename date.

composite_label.description: Display label for the composite metric. Defaults to 'Composite' until the proprietary metric name is decided (PDD v9 §9). One-string change at brand-decision time, no schema migration.

composite_score.description: Two-decimal composite score per SCHEMA-SPEC §10-F. Hard ceiling 9.99 per OUTPUT STANDARD QC4.

tier.description: Tier 1–13 derived from composite per COMPOSITE-SCALE-AND-TIERS.md.

tier_label.description: Tier display label (e.g. 'Quality starter / role-defining contributor').

narrative.description: Vecenie 4-paragraph public narrative per PUBLIC-LANGUAGE-GUIDE §5.1. Each paragraph has a fixed structural role. Frontend renders paragraphs distinctly.

identity.description: Identity paragraph: what this player is. Archetype in plain language, physical profile, headline credentials.

strength.description: Strength evidence paragraph: value drivers, anchored to numbers and observed pattern.

weakness.description: Weakness evidence paragraph: gaps named directly, not buried.

projection_verdict.description: Projection-verdict paragraph: realistic floor, realistic ceiling, what they will and will not become.

domains.description: Eight domain band assignments per SCHEMA-SPEC §4. Order: id 1 through 8.

score.description: Domain score, one-decimal precision per SCHEMA-SPEC §10-F.

one_line.description: One-line domain justification per PUBLIC-LANGUAGE-GUIDE §7. Format: '{Domain}: {score} — "{≤25-word justification}"'.

sub_domains.description: Twenty-six sub-domain scores per SCHEMA-SPEC §3. Order: id 1 through 26.

score.description: Sub-domain score, one-decimal precision per SCHEMA-SPEC §10-F.

rationale_public.description: Rewritten public rationale per PUBLIC-LANGUAGE-GUIDE §4-B: ≤1 sentence, ≤30 words, numbers in word form.

name.description: Signature name per docs/SIGNATURES.md §2 (e.g. 'Rim Finisher', 'Sniper'). Athleticism Signature 'Athlete' renders only on sub-domain #21; #22 is always null.

tier.description: Tier label derived from sub-domain score per docs/SIGNATURES.md §3. Proven 8.0-8.4, Elite 8.5-8.9, Superstar 9.0-9.4, Iconic 9.5-9.9, Generational 10.0.

description.description: ≤25-word public-facing description sourced from docs/SIGNATURES.md §2 verbatim. Static per Signature; identical across all players who earn it. Frontend renders on hover/expand.

signature.description: Signature awarded when sub-domain score ≥ 8.0 per docs/SIGNATURES.md §3-§4. Null when: score < 8.0; sub-domain #7 (Free Throw, always null); sub-domain #22 (Lateral, always null since Athleticism Signature renders on #21). Field is always present; value is null when no Signature. Reconciled fail-loud at export Stage 2.

projection.description: Projection block. Schema-uniform across NBA vet (§8b) and prospect (§8a) routes. Bust/avg/boom optional fields present only for prospects (States 1–3) per PUBLIC-LANGUAGE-GUIDE §4-A.

pot.description: Central projection (POT). Capped at 9.99 per OUTPUT STANDARD QC4.

min.description: Floor projection. Cross-check min ≤ pot enforced at pipeline stage 2 (not encodable in pure JSON Schema).

max.description: Ceiling projection. Cross-check pot ≤ max enforced at pipeline stage 2.

bust_pct.description: Bust outcome probability. Prospects only (States 1–3). Cross-check bust+avg+boom=100 enforced at pipeline stage 2.

comps.description: One to three NBA comps per SCHEMA-SPEC §9.

comp_player.description: Comp player full name. Must resolve against ANCHOR-LIBRARY.md (Phase 4 stage 4 fact-extraction enforces).

comp_tier.description: Text storage form per SCHEMA-SPEC §10-K. Full/Partial/None for prospect multi-comp (NBA-COMP-METHODOLOGY § A); Lineage reserved for the single NBA-vet lineage callout (§ B.4 — qualitative-only, no glyph). Emoji rendered at presentation only.

history.description: Longitudinal evaluation history filtered from wiki/evaluations.jsonl. Empty array on first evaluation. Sorted ascending by date.

career_stats.description: Optional reference appendix per PUBLIC-LANGUAGE-GUIDE §9. Independently sourced at publish time (nba_api or college web-fallback); not byte-equal-checked against _profile.md. Field omitted entirely for HS profiles or when web-fallback fails. NBA-vet branch carries regular_season (required) and optional playoffs; college-prospect branch carries college_career (required) instead. Added in schema v1.1 (2026-05-08).

regular_season.description: NBA regular-season per-game rows + one career-aggregate row (is_career=true). Source: nba_api PlayerCareerStats (per_mode=PerGame), SeasonTotalsRegularSeason + CareerTotalsRegularSeason frames.

playoffs.description: NBA playoffs per-game rows + one career-aggregate row. Omitted when CareerTotalsPostSeason is empty (player never made playoffs).

college_career.description: College career per-game rows + one career-aggregate row. Source: Skill 1 sub-agent web-fallback (Sports-Reference). Team field carries the school name. Replaces regular_season + playoffs for college-prospect profiles.

career_stats_row.description: One row of the career-stats appendix. Per-game stats; percentages as decimal 0–1. Missing values are null. PUBLIC-LANGUAGE-GUIDE §9.3 governs display formatting.

season_id.description: Season identifier ('2024-25') or 'Career' for the bolded aggregate row.

team.description: Team abbreviation ('LAL'), '/'-joined for traded seasons ('LAL/NOP'), or school name for college rows. Empty string for the career-aggregate row.

is_career.description: True for the bolded career-aggregate row; false for per-season rows.
